sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73239" key="o)lolukto/lhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλολυκ-τόλης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n73239.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">addicted to wailing, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0001.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:336" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.336</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
